results.name: ossuary
results.description: A place for storing the bones of the dead.

results.name: otaria
results.description: A continent of Dominaria

results.name: other fictional language
results.description: An otherwise unidentified fictional language in card art.

results.name: other games matter
results.description: Interaction with other games you can see, have played, or will play.

results.name: otiev
results.description: A judge on Ravnica controlled by the Dimir.

results.name: otto octavius
results.description: A scientist best known in his supervillain identity as [Doctor Octopus](https://tagger.scryfall.com/tags/artwork/doctor-octopus).

results.name: ouroboros
results.description: Depicts a snake or dragon swallowing its own tail, as an emblem of wholeness or infinity.

results.name: outdated typeline
results.description: Typelines that are no longer supported, such as Interrupt, Summon, etc.

results.name: outnumber
results.description: Deal damage to a creature based on your creature count.

results.name: overrun
results.description: Effects that grant trample and +P/+T

results.name: oversized creature
results.description: Creatures much greater than their usual scale.

results.name: over-under
results.description: Art where you can see above and below the water at the same time, with the water line splitting the frame.

results.name: owlin
results.description: Owl avens

results.name: oxidda chain
results.description: A volcanic and mountainous region of Mirrodin, and home to Kuldotha, the Great Furnace.

results.name: ozai
results.description: Fire Lord. Phoenix King. Definitely not Father of the Year.

results.name: pacifism
results.description: A form of removal that prevents a creature from attacking, and usually also from blocking and/or activating its abilities.

results.name: painland
results.description: Lands that deal damage to the user upon tapping them for mana

results.name: painter
results.description: Depicts a character that paints

results.name: painting
results.description: As in a painted image

results.name: pair-commander
results.description: These cards can be one half of a two-card pair of commanders

results.name: paladins of 7ed
results.description: Four paladins showed up in 7th Edition, each associated with a cardinal direction and appearing on multiple other cards. Each one is missing an eye. The North and South are mutual allies; the West and East are mutual enemies.

results.name: paleontology
results.description: The study of ancient past life through (primarily) fossils. (See also [archaeology](/tags/artwork/archaeology))

results.name: paliano
results.description: The High City of Fiora.

results.name: palisade
results.description: A wall made from vertical timbers, typically with sharpened tips.
